title: VHS Cord
description: Retro syled shaderpack to replicate specific technical limitations of older consoles like PS1.
body:
## **Retro styled Minecraft shaderpack for older consoles like PS1**

1. Added shaders to the day and night cycle
2. VHS effect along with camcorder effect in the player's POV
3. Realistic transparent water instead of vanilla minecraft water

![shader-preview-1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a615df8b90a91a94cd11f78fbb8903d574bff0b.jpeg)![shader-preview-2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f5734d9d4de6cda969e3c321ebcbff20e9102b6.jpeg)
